violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in hot water of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to wash away any food particles or other debris. Utensils were moved to dry surface during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in one of the following manners; on a dry clean surface, in hot water of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more, or in water with sufficient flow to wash away any food particles or other debris. Utensils were moved to dry surface during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
